title: Nice wireless earbuds
text: I was looking for wireless earbuds because I lost my last pair. This one was on sale, and the price is very good, so I decided to give it a try. I just received them yesterday. They work right out of the box. The sound quality is pretty nice with good bass. They easily paired and connected to my iPhone. But I prefer to connect one of them to my iPhone and one to the laptop or connect two earbuds independently to my iPhone. The only thing I don't like is that the left and right earbud show the same name on my iPhone -  S8. They should have used S8-L and S8-R, so I will know which one to connect/disconnect. It may be just my personal preference. It says the earbuds are with IPX8 waterproof, which protects earbuds from rain and sweat during sporting, running, jogging, swimming, shower, and yoga, etc., but not for diving. It is an excellent feature because most others are IPX5, but I haven't got a chance to test it yet.

title: Wonderful! Especially for the price!
text: [[VIDEOID:c0b8edb13200338be5491a2fd74100a]] These little earbuds are spectacular! The sound quality is good and the mic picks up everything. The sound quality is good but not great. These are inexpensive but totally useable and easy to use for work or play. AND you do not have to stress if you lose one or both, the cost is so reasonable that you can just replace them. They connect to computers and phones seamlessly and charge with ease. The functions are changed by tapping the earbuds, again, super easy. Now into charging, I have not had any issue with them staying charged for my entire ten hour work day, albeit, I do not have my earbuds going the entire ten hours, probably half of the day or a little more. Great buy!

title: Right bud failed in 2 months. No Support. Returned Emails.
text: These buds were actually quite good - sadly just for about 2 months of very sporadic use.  Maybe used only 10 times total.  All of the sudden, the right earbud won't turn off, but also won't pair or play anything.  Its little red light just glows red constantly and won't go off.  Watched their troubleshooting videos and nothing worked - tried resetting, charging for 24 hours, pressing the button for 15 seconds - all did no good.  Tried to contact company via its website and Facebook contact methods.  Notice in the photo, the left (blue one) immediately goes into pairing mode and flashes blue/red as it should.  The right (red one) stays solid red and doesn't respond.  By the way, I have taken excellent care of these buds and they have never been in water (even though they are designed to) and have only been used to listen to TV.  Both posted email addresses are invalid (returned mail) and no response to Facebook DM.  Barely too late for an Amazon return.  If you are going to sell electr

title: Great earbuds
text:
The Apple AirPods hurt my ears bc of the hard plastic part (even the newer version with squishy earbuds).
I decided to try a cheaper version. These do just the trick at a much lower price point.
One con for me is that if I answer my phone on my phone when a call comes in instead of from the earbuds, the audio will go through my phone instead of the earbuds. It just takes time to develop the habit of tapping my earbuds to answer the phone.
The second con is it is not easy to switch the audio back and forth from earbuds to phone like it is with the AirPods, but you learn to emblem with what you have.
I do believe these are worth the price and are a good competitor to the AirPods.

title: Great product for price !!
text: [[VIDEOID:39427db18424a7d10ed2a4d4a1c2ed54]] I have only had these for a few hours I will update after a month but great sound , I am hoping they last , I can’t believe for this price how good they are I was vey skeptical but so glad I got them on a deal

title: Okay, above average for the price but not super quality
text:
Overall, I’m happy with the product. They seem to work well when speaking on the phone, haven’t had any issues. I don’t feel like they get particularly loud but it’s loud enough that I’m okay with it for now. I do personally struggle keeping them in my ears, I’ve tried changing the ear bits. I think it’s just my ear shape. Also, they really do stick out from your ears quite a bit. Sorta looks funny but who cares? At least people can easily tell I’ve got earbuds in.

They connect very easily to my iPhones Bluetooth, not issues pairing them. Still adjusting to the controls, I’ve had them for about a month now and I still haven’t gotten the controls down. I had the AirPods for awhile and loved them. Lost one of the ear pieces and didn’t feel like spending $80 for a replacement for one. I liked that, with the AirPods, the long part of the pod allowed you to adjust them in your ears without accidentally touching the touch-controls. Because these earbuds don’t have that, anytime I

title: Awesome earbuds... not so awesome case
text:
So, first off, let me say that these cheap little earbuds are really great! It's always kinda a risky feeling when I buy cheap electronics, because the quality could go either way. But these are a really good find. Clear, crisp sound with good bass... awesome battery life... right size. Perfecto! Well, almost perfecto...

The only design flaw is in the case, which I'm seeing a lot of these bluetooth earbuds having these days. The case is so smooth & they only put a tiny finger grip strip on one side of the lid, so there's nothing to grip the other side of the case, making it a clumbsy open & you risk dropping the whole thing (which I usually did). Thankfully, I never lost an earbud before thinking of a simple hack (albeit, not the prettiest solution, but it works). Just add a little strip from a hot glue gun to the bottom side of the case and viola! Double grip and easy opening. Now it's perfecto! ;-)

title: Great for small ears
text: I have tiny ear holes and these were great. I bought these and another pair which were a tad bit smaller so my 11 y/o daughter took those and I kept these. Love that they charge in the case without being plugged into a wall. That was just a bonus. They last me for many hours and since I only use one at a time, I can get over a day's use out of them. They don't fall out easily (although sometimes I feel like they're barely hanging in there). I had the smallest size covers on. Quality is good and people don't have a problem hearing me on phone calls but I mostly use them to listen to audio books while I'm driving, walking and working around the house. I guess I did get a little ear fatigue at first but then you really do get use to them. I used to use a corded, single earbud but my new phone didn't have the port anymore so I had to upgrade finally to wireless. I still had to get 2 pairs in case I lost any or rather misplaced them but so good so far. Regardless, they're inexpensive enough

title: Excellent!!
text:
Great product - buy without hesitation
Details:
Needed a backup pair after - been using Apple AirPods for 3 years now - I knew it was going to be a tough choice
Been reading reviews and looking at prices, asking questions
I had them for 3 days now - and they immediately became the primary pair - ditched the Apple ! Can you believe that 🙂
Music and sound quality is great for my ears
Can make phone calls using either one (R or L)
People on the other end couldn’t tell I switched to different type
I make on average 3 hours of calls daily and listen to 2-3 hours of music
Battery life great after 1 hr call followed immediately by 2 hrs music the battery was at 50%
Recharging in the box was quick about 30 min
I charged the box/case only once , still good after 3 days , that’s more than good enough for me
I got 9 pairs of different rubber covers, with different styles, so you will definitely find one that is perfect for you - I found

title: Fair for a few weeks
text:
At first I was somewhat pleased with the sound, although they're not as good as a pair of sport headphones with the wire loop that connects them behind the neck. For the money I will get that kind again. The sound is better and they've lasted longer.

The Kurdene earbuds sound rather tinny, but I put up with that for a while since they seemed convenient, though when I bent over they tended to slip out of my ears. I tried all the ear adapters and nothing helped...except not bending over. I don't have this problem with other earbuds.

I hated the haptic controls. They are overly sensitive, and not intuitive. I would try to adjust the volume by tapping or holding the earbud and instead they would turn off. After a while both functions stopped working.

The worst thing was that after about 6 weeks they went haywire. When you set them in the charging cradle they are supposed to turn off. I noticed that they would still be connected to my phone or computer hours

title: I'm 100% Amazed!
text: I was warry about ordering another pair of "cheap" earbuds, but they were packaged very well and had them paired to my phone within a couple minutes. My first listen was with a rap song because I wanted to see how the base sounded...I was 100% amazed by the sound quality. They came with 5 additional sizes of ear inserts to ensure they fit universal size ears and a charging Type C cord (very short). I also liked they way they fit. I had a $200 pair of Jabras previously that I lost, but after an hour of wearing them my ears would start getting irritated. These S8's Pros fit my ears perfectly and feel soft (if that makes sense). Plus I ordered them in the aqua blue. I think these are the best ear buds under $30 you'll ever buy. Believe me I would 100% return them the same day if they were crap. But, now I'm placing another order in purple for my wife.

title: Incredible value
text: This is my first pair of wireless earbuds, and my first thought is I wish I had not waited so long. They used to be all fairly pricey, so when I saw these for around $20 US I had to get them.  The sound quality is amazingly good.  You will want to tweak your source to fit these earbuds. I had my bass set very high and too much will (understandably) cause these to buzz as the bass tops out.  But when you get it right, these will be very close to a nice pair of inexpensive earbuds.  But it's the comfort and freedom from wires that's the big change for me.  I can listen to these easily for their whole 5 hour charge time and not feel weary from either the sound or the weight of the earphones/headphones.  It's also incredible to me to have a pause function available by just tapping on one of the earphones. Have a conversation, then just tap to start up the music again.  I think these are for everyone, if you already have an expensive pair of wireless earbuds get these as a back up, and if l

title: So far so good
text: I ordered these so that I could  “work out while listening to music” but to be honest I haven’t done that yet. To be very honest I haven’t even gone to the gym yet since purchasing them. However I did use them to listen to the Johnny Depp trial live while traveling and shopping and they worked great for that.

title: I could hear my footsteps
text: I think these were great for the price, and I haven’t had a lot of experience with wireless ear buds. I put them in and tried to walk and I could hear my footsteps very loudly through the ear phones. I didn’t think they were super comfortable, so I did end up returning them. I think they’re a good value and if you don’t have those issues you’re probably very happy with those!

title: They are NOT that small. If you have tiny ears or need for a child DON'T buy them!
text: They are not that small! The ends were to big to fit in my ear and kind of funny shaped so they just kept falling out.

title: They’re good headphones but the battery dies incredibly fast and connectivity issues.
text:
I really like these headphones but they die faster than any Bluetooth headphones I’ve had before. They also connect to my Apple Watch but will disconnect and don’t work when you play sound. I have to connect them every time.
I will say that the sound quality is fantastic and they fit perfectly into my ears with comfort. The buttons, though a bit sensitive, are nice to have. They were also cheaper than AirPods so that’s a plus I guess.

title: Returning these - fall out of my ears too much
text: These are meh! Sound is not great but it's ok. Case is poorly designed and is a real pain to open. Battery life is not very long. They are very comfortable in my ears however they keep falling out. Unless I want to sit perfectly still to use these, they just don't work for me. I'll be taking advantage of Amazon's generous return policy and sending these back.

title: Nice set of earbuds
text: Really enjoy these earbuds. They fit my ears perfectly and stay put.

title: DON'T WASTE YOUR MONEY!
text: Seriously, DON'T WASTE YOUR MONEY ON THIS...battery does not last at all. Very cheap quality.

title: Earbuds Are ok!
text:
These earbuds are ok for the price. I purchased these to wear while working outdoors doing lawn work or gardening. Overall they work, but the negative part is they fall out of your ear very often. Also when you perspire they fall out even more frequently. I figured it wouldn't be this bad just riding on a mower but as you move your head they work their way out of your ear.

I have even switched out the ear pieces but to no avail. Still same issue falling from your ears. If you have a conversation on your phone with these yep falling out again. The quality of sound is ok but nothing to write home about. Maybe if they had additional support in the ear it would help. So for me if your stationary and not talking or laying down the earbuds work decently.

title: Insanely good battery life!
text:
I bought these earbuds on a whim without looking at reviews or anything after I lost my last pair of earbuds and couldn't get the same ones on Amazon.

Guys. These are the best earbuds ever. I have had them for a month now, I use one earbud at a time for at least 2 hours a day, but closer to 6 hours on 2 or 3 days of the week. I have only had to charge the case ONE TIME so far.

They pair really easily with my phone. They let me pause, play, and skip songs AND adjust my media volume without getting my phone. I have used them to make phone calls and have never had any issues.

Last week I dropped the case in the parking lot at work as I got in my car and didn't realize until I got home that one of them fell out. I went back to work the next day and when I got out of the car it had already connected to my phone and taken over my music!

These things are legit. I'm thinking about buying a couple more sets so I can keep one at work and not risk losin

title: Great for the price
text: I bought these to replace Apple Airbuds that never fit properly and stopped holding a charge. I use them exclusively for listening to books on tape, and they are perfect. They stay in, even when I lie down, and hold a charge for many hours. And they're inexpensive enough that I'm not terrified of losing one.

title: One bud died after only 2 weeks
text: after about 2 wreks one bud was dead.  no lights, sound etc

title: I have had these for 4 months.... nearly dead already
text: I love the size of these for my small ears BUT the battery is horrible.  These work about 45 minutes before they need charging again.  I have only used these about 5 hours total.  and will be no good to me for the reason I bought them (to fly across the country).  I would have returned them but I was didn't use them much until recently when the return window was dead.

title: Boyfriend loves them
text: I bought these for my boyfriend bc he always had me on speaker phone. He absolutely loves them.  He hears me well and I hear him well. He watches moves and says he can now ignore his coworkers lol.  I'm gonna purchase a pair for me.

title: They’re very comfortable
text: I buy this for my hubby and he like it use it  every day

title: Not worth it.
text: Tinny sound, I couldn't tap them on or off as advertised and the don't last the day. So I returned them after less than a week.

title: Amazing for the price
text: With constant use I don't have to recharge them for over 9 hours and then a short 20mins. and they last the rest of my shift. Sound quality is impressive. It all depends on how you seat them in your ears. I run equipment on construction sites so a lot of bouncing or jolts and they can become loose in my ear. Not a big deal if you pay attention to how they feel. Overall I am extremely happy with them

title: sound is adequate
text:
my JBL headphones and my Airpods have superior sound, but for $25, these ear buds must be considered more than adequate.

If you want good sound - spend more $ and move up market.

I am using them on only my desktop PC - they fire up right away - which is really nice. (my airpods are used only for my iphone or ipad)

title: Poor Sound
text: I have purchased at least 6 ear buds at this price point over the years, these are the worst. They are bulky, the sound is non dynamic and completely without bass. The volume at maximum is so low that passing traffic interferes with listening to audiobooks. I am returning them.

title: Useless doesn't connect
text: Useless can't connect to my phone or kindle or laptop.

title: Lackluster
text: These headphones are decent. I'd like to hear what the others in this price range sound like.  There are times where I can barely hear my sound and you can't turn them up.  There are a lot of times as well where my phone is in my pockets and my headphones are cutting out as well.  It's like they can't get a good connection with my phone in my pocket.  Also, the "touch portion" of these headphones are a joke as it doesn't work well at all.  I can't hang the phone up with them, I can barely turn them down, but not up. They do fall out of my ears on occasion and aren't held in as well as other brands. Take these back to the drawing board and redesign them.

title: Bad microphone
text: I purchased this Kurdene BT earbud set, my second, but returned these due to a bad microphone.  When I got my first call the person on the other end couldn't hear anything but a very muffled voice.  I had someone call me again to see if it was a consistent problem.  Same issue with the second try.  I like the punchy base on these, and they are great for noise cancelling.  But I wear them a lot when I need to be able to take calls hands free, so the poor mic was problem for me. I'm trying a different brand and hoping for betterQC.

title: One stopped working and the other has interference in the background.  Very disappointing
text:
Worked great for a while. Now one is totally dead and the other one has interference in the background waste of money.
No way to return.

title: Perfect inexpensive earbuds
text: Not much to dislike with these, definitely pack a punch for the price.

title: great
text: once you find the right fit they are great

title: Ear buds
text: These ear buds are very comfortable and perfect for working out. Great value for the money.

title: Cute headphones- but they don't last long.
text: These headphones were good for a while- they held their charge like they were supposed to in the beginning and they worked really well. Great sound and mic quality- especially for being on the cheaper end of Bluetooth headphones. Though, after a couple of weeks of use, the left headphone specifically would altogether stop charging. I would be able to have it on for maybe 2-8 minutes, then it would notify me that it was at low battery. I'm not exactly sure what happened here, but the left headphone because practically useless. I was able to return them though and got a full refund. I'm sad they didn't work out- they were really cute headphones!

title: Nice product for the price.
text: I thought the sound quality and noise cancellation for just fine, so far i am happy with the product.

title: Disappointed
text: Thet were great but last very little

title: Amazing sound, Long battery
text: I typically hate earbuds and prefer over the head headphones....I like my music LOUD--I like to drown out ALL the noise. Needed something small for a long flight. These were way better than I had hoped. Super comfortable in the ears, charged one time...lasted the entire trip. Charged for the second time one week after the trip. These even worked standing in the middle of the ocean--- the color (orange) made them super fun!! Hight recommend

title: Exactly what I was looking for
text: These are great. They’re the only earphones I’ve found that will stay in my ears, while working out. VERY noice canceling! Love that you don’t have to recharge them after every use and they charge themselves in the case, so I don’t have to worry about accidentally leaving them behind before heading to the gym. I think I used them 7 times before needed to charge the case again.

title: They do not answer your calls
text: I gave these a three star but just to be fair it may just be operator error. I may not know how to use them properly. When I say answer a call they don't then I have run and get my phone. The distance range for bugs is not good, maybe 100ft and I think I am giving them some extra. Probably won't keep them because they don't do what I purchased them to do.

title: Easy to pair and get started
text: Good sound quality. Easy to pair to phone.

title: 10/10 Would Recommend These Headphones
text: Awesome headphones! Multiple cool features. Easy to use. Everything works perfectly. Buttons are very responsive which makes it easy to: take phone calls, skip songs, pause, and change to voice command. I have an iPhone 8, and they immediately synced, no issues. I’ve charged my case once, and it’s been charging my headphones for a week straight. I’ve already used them to take a phone call, and even tested their water proof ability. I was able to shower and listen to an audiobook, very clear, no breaks in connection. Once again, awesome headphones!

title: Great
text: Bluetooth range is great. My son loves these.

title: These Ear buds are nice!
text: These buds are decent, fit well , and dont fall off, the noise cancellation works very well. The sound is good, just not great, but decent and clear!

title: most have
text: so far this item is extraordinary

title: Entrega rápida. recibido en buenas condiciones
text: Buen precio, entrega rápida, llegó lo que compré y en buen esttado.

title: Good headphones for the price
text: I have to buy earbuds on the cheaper side bc my kiddos and lost/broke several pairs. These are great earbuds for the price. The sound quality is crystal clear. Only issue, is they’re not very loud. I like loud music while I’m cleaning

title: These are okay
text: These earbuds are okay the sound is clear but they hardly have bass.

title: Good bargain
text: Fits perfectly in my ears and don’t fall out. Sound quality was ok, especially considering the low cost.

title: A Decent Earbuds for the Price
text: Nowadays earbuds could cost between up to $250 or more and the difference in sound quality may not be that noticeable.  Since I intend to lost them frequently, I only buy earbuds that less than $50-$60.  This pair performs OK, sound quality is not a wow, just slightly better than the average.  It offers 6 pairs adapters for different ear fitting but none of them are really snuggle fit.  It still falls off from the ear from time to time, especially during workouts.  I swim almost everyday but have not tried to use them during swimming, pretty sure they will fall off the ears.

title: The sound is good
text: The only problem is, since I got it, the case light shows orange. I charged it for a few hours and it's still orange so I'm not sure if the orange indicator means fully charged or it should be green. Otherwise, it's okay.

title: Cheap and efficient
text: These are decent cheap Bluetooth headphones. I wanted basic, cheap and effective headphones. They are awesome for under 20.00 for them.

title: Maybe its just me they dont stay in your ears
text: First day using this kind of a Ear Bud.They fell out 3 times .other then that their great...I am gonna lose one real soon,Yes I ve locked them in my ears...walking around ...makes them come lose

title: Work great
text: These work great. Nice product for the price.

title: These are a budget miracle.
text: It's like a high priced quality pair.  Budget without all the little problems those usually have.

title: 3rd time bought, 2/3 have been worthless
text:
I buy cheap earbuds because I tend to lose them all the time. The first Kurdene earbuds I bought were perfect, no issues for the cost.
The last two pairs have been a complete waste of money. I have to charge them in a different case because the last two don’t charge them at all, just blinks red.
I still have time to return these, just need to find where I left the worthless charging case 🤦🏻‍♀️

title: S-8 Buds
text: Purchased in March of 2022.  Didn't use for about a month and now batteries will not charge.

title: Poor quality.
text: Poor quality. Keep disconnecting. Music Play back skips.

title: convenience
text: My 13 year old love her girly pink ear buds. Its perfect for running.  5 hour battery and works even with her flip phone.

title: My mom LOVED these!
text: Mom is super happy with her Christmas gift!

title: these work quite well with our 55" LG OLED tv.
text: The ear buds are promptly and accurately recognized by the LG system, which is what they were purchased for.  Audio quality is good.  The charging base is useful.  And battery life is, so far, more than I need.

title: Useless!
text:
First thing you will notice is an instruction sheet so small you need a magnifying glass to read it!
After you get done reading the wildly inaccurate directions you can move on to the earbuds themselves.
First the large part of the earbud (where all the electronics are) are so bulky that you cannot actually get the earbud itself all the way in to your ear. So unless you are sitting still, they will fall out. I walked from the living room to the kitchen and the both fell out. I can only imagine what would happen if you tried to jog.
So if you can actually get them paired (which took me three times) and get them to sit in your ears the sounds is OK. A solid C+.
Now on to the "haptic" controls. Those seriously suck. First they are so sensitive that if you even try to adjust one in your ear it will keep pausing and playing your music. So clearly you cannot touch them.
If you do want to do fancy things like skipping a song or going back or even adjust the volu

title: Good but problematic for small ears
text: I have very small ears and I'm not sure if these will fit over the long run. Even with the smallest adapters it's hard to get them to stay in. They do seem to work quite well however.

title: CRAP!!! Please revamp this sensitive earbud!!! And case!!!!!!!!!
text: CRAP!!!!!!!!!!!Way to sensitive .. dont even think about touching it.. holy moly!! They need to revamp it.. yikes the case is very hard to open unless you have very thin nails!! ABSOLUTELY!!!! Its crap

title: Bought for hubby, he loves!!
text: I won’t be paying AirPod money anytime soon with these around. They work very well!

title: Decent product, works great for my needs
text: The only thing I dislike about this product is they are a bit large but these are my first wireless earbuds so my comparison is from the standard wire type. The positive I can say about this product is I use them at night for music or white noise and they haven't fallen out during my sleep and I only use one since I'm a side sleeper. The sound quality is very good. Overall I am very happy with the earbuds and will buy them again if needed.

title: Surprisingly great! This is my 2nd pair
text: I really like these, I was afraid I'd regret this purchase but no way. These are probably the best purchase I've made in a long time. They are so convenient and easy to use!

title: Perfect
text: Honestly these are great. I LOVE these earbuds. The battery seems to last forever, the sound quality is really good for the price, and they're pretty comfy. The noise cancelling is also very effective. The color is so cute too. I'd definitely recommend these to anyone looking for affordable wireless earbuds.

title: Worked for a day!
text: Left one refuses to work after a day of music. I guess you get what you pay for. Pure junk. They should give people money back. Such a shame!!

title: Sound is good, fits well in the ear.
text: They have a good sound.  I don't find that they are noise canceling.

title: Way better than I expected!
text: Great sound quality, connects really easily. Comfortable.  Well worth the price.

title: Problem with left earbud
text:
Not much noise cancelation at all. They tend to fall out of my ears, even with different sizes of padding.
Great battery life. But the left earbud was never as loud as right one, and over time it got quieter so that I couldn't hear anything out of it.

title: can’t handle any bass
text: if the song has any bit of bass, the headphones shake horribly and the audio messes up. turning the volume to the lowest level doesn’t help. If you only listen to acoustic songs, this should work for you

title: Very Happy!
text: Great product! Great sound for music and gets loud! Phone calls are clear and the person on the other side can hear my voice clearly even with a lot of noise around. They fit well, even with my tiny ears, usually I cant keep buds in for long. Controls are touchy but all work well. Defiantly a great product for the price!

title: Disappointed
text:
I tried these for a few weeks before returning them. One ear cut in & out, the comfort was not there & if you held the but just right, you could hear the beauty of the music. Let go & it fell out.
The buttons were way, way to sensitive, just reaching up to scratch my ear, they turned off.

title: Kurdene Wireless Earbuds
text: I love these! I was quite surprised how well the sound quality is. The price was right too!

title: Great inexpensive Bluetooth earbuds
text: First night using these and the sounds wonderful. The fit is comfortable and the noise cancellation is very very good. I’m seeing how long the battery life per charge is and how long the case takes to recharge them without hooking back to a power supply. The ONLY thing missing is a meter showing how much charge the case has left. All around so far I’m recommending these very highly. If I remember I will try to update after using them for some time so as to make adjustments accordingly if needed.

title: For the price, I will buy two!
text:
Are you kidding? 14.00 for these awesome buds? I am a bigger lover of instrument sound and I can hear everything. Ok they are not perfect but here is the rundown.
PROS: Sound is great, nice and clear, fit big ears well, can handle a volume booster no issue, no lag.
CONS: They are tiny and may have to dig them out of an ear. you will need a volume booster if you want loudness, the tips have an inner plastic cone to fit onto the bud, difficult to get back on if you take it off. But again for 14.00, it is a no-brainer

title: Great buy!
text: These are better than the JLab ear buds I had. Nice quality and I can hear music while riding on my zero turn.

title: Ready right out of the box
text:
I started listening to synctuition and corded headphones just get in the way of relaxing.
I was surprised & delighted to find these charged up upon receiving them. So easy to use even for an old chick like me. These come with several different comfort tips to fit your ear canal and a cute case.
The sound is just incredible, too! So much better than my ancient corded pair~you have no idea!
They must be comfortable as I keep falling asleep with them in my ears haha!
Great purchase!

title: Great Earbuds for the price
text: I had a little difficulty hooking them up to my phone with the Bluetooth when i first revived them.  But once i got it figured out it was perfectly fine...likely operator error. They have a great sound and long battery life for what your paying for them.  NO complaints... i would purchase them again!!

title: Best budget
text: Hands down the best budget friendly earbuds around.

title: Not for running, they bounce out fast and then turn off
text:
I bought these to go wireless while running.
The shape has most of the weight of the earbuds outside your ear cavity, meaning after a minute or running they are jiggling loose and need to be nudged back into your ear. Unfortunately, touching the earbud cycles between play and stop. So for me, completely useless for sporting activities especially running.

title: Won’t stay in ear
text: These will NOT stay in my ear no matter what I try and when you go to adjust them they either pause or skip or activate Siri but when I am TRYING to turn the volume up they won’t respond. DEFINITELY returning yet another set of ear buds.

title: Great for everything
text: Between walking my neighborhood and riding my motorcycle. These are great! Steady sound, hold solid in my ears, and are easy to connect to BlueTooth. I use these every day in some capacity. We went for a 250 mile motorcycle ride, my phone died before the ear buds did. Made for a great ride!

title: Good Sound for an unbeatable price.
text: I might find slightly better audio quality for 5x the price.  But when you are listening to audio books or music on the run, these are unbeatable for only $20.  They work well with only the left or right bud in and either one responds to the tap button start/stop.  If you are tired of worrying about your expensive ear buds, or looking to replace them (yet again), then save some money and get these.

title: Surprise! No need to spend big bucks!
text: Listening to music we are learning in our cover band. Headphones or ear buds allow you to pick up so many nuances that are missed when just listening to a speaker on a TV, or worse, your cell phone. For the money you can’t go wrong with these. Excellent bass tones as well…

title: I like them!
text: I got these to replace a corded set of bluetooth sound buds, and they're comfortable.  The control buttons are sensitive, and there is a little curve...but overall, they sound good and they stay put.

title: Has pros and cons
text: Pros: low price, nice the cancel right away when you touch them in your ear. Cons: pretty heavy and the shape makes me worry they will fall out. (Should have trusted other reviews that said that.) Sound quality is fair.

title: For those with small inner ears
text:
I have tried other earbuds. Even expensive ones like from apple. I have bought the accessories kit with the cushions. Somehow they are so big they hurt but still find a way to fall out.

These fit in really well. They don’t hurt my ears. The buttons are too flat and I have no idea how well they will hold up. But Right now I love them.

title: Wanted to love them
text: Sounds great. Long battery. Could not fit my ears even with the different silicone adapters provided. I went with neck speaker instead. Feel safer because I can hear my music and still hear my surroundings and have my phone being able to answer

title: 4.5 stars
text:
4.5 stars, but it's not possible to rank it as such in Amazon.

I like these earbuds - excellent sound and the battery life is fantastic.   the carrying case is also a charging case, which comes in very handy. The earbuds can be used together or separately, and there is no light on the outside of them to indicate that they're on or give away that you're listening to something.  the only reason I wd mark it down to 4.5 stars is because the earbud charging/storage case is annoyingly difficult to open (it's slippery) - and I have nails.  I deal with it;  it wd be helpful if there were a slightly bigger notch to open this case.  I wd still buy these again.  Great product!

title: Ear Buds
text: Great battery call quality is okay.

title: Not bad at all
text: I don’t believe in expensive wireless headphones as they can be lost easily. These work well. The battery life is good, last me the day. Sound quality in nice and the battery charging case is convenient plus it has a USB C charging port which is great. All in all. For the price of $14 they are worth it and make a decent pair of wireless heads.

title: Quality
text: I got these within a month they quit working. I only used then one time after that they kept turning off wouldn't stay on even after charging 24 hrs. Don't waste your money.

title: Ok for listening to music, but the mic wasn't the best
text: People struggled to hear me when having a phone call, but listening to music was ok

title: Great headphones
text: They connected instantly and sound great. Had no issues setting them up.
